scripts.lint: bun run lint-js && bun run lint-text && bun run lint-style
scripts.lint-js: bunx oxlint --fix && bunx eslint --fix . && bunx jscpd .
scripts.lint-text: npx cspell . && bun ./node_modules/@nitra/cursor/scripts/run-shellcheck-text.mjs && bunx markdownlint-cli2 --fix "**/*.md" "**/*.mdc" && bun ./node_modules/@nitra/cursor/scripts/run-v8r.mjs
